code: import*as Cookies from'js-cookie';import{useMemo}from'react';import{removeCookie,setCookie}from'../helpers/CookieHelpers';export function useUserState(){var user=useMemo(function(){return Cookies.get('user_data');},[]);return JSON.parse(user||'{}');}export function setUser(user){setCookie('user_data',JSON.stringify(user));}export function clearUserData(){removeCookie('user_data');}
